title: Implement full dataflow analysis with branch merging
description: Replace dataflow stub with complete DataflowAnalyzer: Define (strong update for ;), DefineIndeterminate for command substitution, MergeBranch for &&/|| may-alias union, Resolve, ResolveString with cartesian product (capped at 16), ExportedVars. Update extractor walk for branch analyzers in list nodes, emit WarnExpansionCapped/WarnCommandSubstitution, produce multiple ExtractedCommand variants. Unit tests for all dataflow scenarios.
